name: Initialize project
description: Create React app with TypeScript setup (assuming already done, but include in plan)

name: Implement game logic
description: Write useSnakeGame hook or inline logic: grid size, snake array, direction, food position, movement, collision detection, score increment

name: Build UI components
description: Create Board (grid), Score display, Game Over overlay, Restart button, all within App.tsx

name: Style with glass effects
description: Write CSS for glassmorphism: background blur, semi-transparent colors, border glow, subtle shadows

name: Add controls and game loop
description: Implement useEffect for keyboard event listeners, setInterval for game tick, update state accordingly

name: Test and refine
description: Check for bugs, ensure smooth gameplay, responsive layout, and aesthetic consistency
